name: Ahjikan Co., Ltd.
summary: Ahjikan Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various food products in Japan. It provides processed chicken eggs, vegetable, and fish paste products, as well as imitation crab meat, sushi, surimi, tofu, cooked vegetables, Japanese style side dishes, burdock tea-related products, and others. The company also engages in the production and sale of agricultural products, as well as exports its products. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
